title: Matterbridge Ecovacs Plugin
description: Bridges Ecovacs Deebot robot vacuums into Apple Home via Matter

email.title: Ecovacs Account Email
email.description: The email address of your Ecovacs account

countryCode.title: Country Code
countryCode.description: Two-letter country code (e.g. IT, DE, US, UK)

authDomain.title: Auth Domain (optional)
authDomain.description: Leave empty for default (ecovacs.com). Use yeedi.com for Yeedi devices.

whiteList.title: Device Whitelist
whiteList.description: List of device nicknames to include. Leave empty to include all devices.

pollingInterval.title: Polling Interval (seconds)
pollingInterval.description: How often to poll the device for status updates (0 = push only, 30-600 recommended)

rooms.title: Room Configuration
rooms.description: Customize which rooms are visible in Apple Home and their display names. Rooms not listed here will be shown with their names from the Ecovacs app.

id.title: Room ID
id.description: The Ecovacs internal room ID (shown in logs as 'Room loaded: ID = name')

name.title: Custom Name
name.description: Custom display name in Apple Home. Leave empty to use the Ecovacs name.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether this room is visible in Apple Home
